transcript.network_error: Network error - the ATC reply could not be transmitted after 3 attempts. Check your connection/backend, then retry.
status.banner_openai_key_missing: OpenAI API key missing - PTT disabled.
status.banner_openai_hint: Open the Settings tab and paste your OpenAI API key.
status.banner_models_not_ready: Local models not ready - PTT disabled.
status.banner_models_hint: Open the Models tab to download / verify (~2.0 GB total).
models.openai_no_models: No local models needed. Inference runs via api.openai.com.
models.openai_hint: Back to local models: switch 'Backend' in the Settings tab.
models.low_disk_format: Needed: %s - only %s free on this volume!
models.bandwidth_hint: HuggingFace HTTPS, resumable. 5-30 min over a typical home network.
models.section_ai_models: Optional AI models (not required to fly)
models.ai_model_note: Only for advanced intent recognition; the sim runs fine without it.
audio.test_hint: Records 3 seconds and plays it back to check microphone + speaker.
audio.output_hint: Output: X-Plane Radio Device (Settings > Sound > Radio Device)
settings.backend_x86_hint: Local inference requires Apple Silicon. This slice of the universal binary is OpenAI-only.
settings.api_key_missing: No API key configured - paste a key below.
settings.api_save_failed: Save failed (empty key or keychain error)
settings.voice_tip: Tip: 'onyx' is closest to a real ATC voice.
settings.ptt_bind_hint: Bind via X-Plane: Settings > Joystick > Buttons & Keys
settings.vfr_destination_hint: (enter destination, e.g. EDDS -- yields 'VFR to EDDS'; Enter saves)
flightprep.dest_hint: (enter ICAO, e.g. EDMA; Enter saves. Or speak: 'VFR to Echo Delta Mike Alfa')
settings.debug_text_input: Debug: text input instead of microphone
settings.bzf_strict_mode: BZF strict mode (Tower checks mandatory readback)
settings.bzf_strict_stt_warning: Note: local and Mistral speech recognition are weak on spelled call signs - strict mode can then wrongly reject correct readbacks. For strict mode OpenAI is recommended, otherwise leave strict off.
settings.voices_tip: Tip: download more voices in the Models tab to widen the selection.
settings.conflicts_body: Verbal ATC messages and the ATC history popup are suppressed. The following X-Plane commands can still trigger default ATC behavior if bound to a key or joystick button. Unbind them in the X-Plane keyboard settings to avoid conflicts:
flightlog.new_flight_tip: Starts a new flight-log file under data/flightlog. Use when the automatic flight separation missed a change.
tooltip.backend:
Local: runs on this Mac (Apple Silicon, ~2 GB models).
OpenAI Cloud: audio + transcripts are sent to api.openai.com.
Switching reloads the inference pipeline.
tooltip.ui_language:
Language of the operating UI (menus, buttons, labels).
Independent of the phraseology - applies immediately, no restart needed.
tooltip.language:
Language of the ATC phraseology (what is spoken, ATC responses and hints).
German: NfL DACH-VFR phraseology (BZF).
English: ICAO-VFR phraseology.
Applies from the next plugin start (profile and local TTS voice are loaded at init).
tooltip.start_mode:
Cold and dark: unpowered cockpit at the parking spot.
Engines running: warm cockpit at the parking spot, ready for the Ground call.
Ready for takeoff: at the holding point, waiting for Tower clearance.
Applies from the next sim start.
tooltip.skip_radio_power:
Enable if your aircraft does not report radio power correctly.
Radio buttons and PTT work without ship's power.
tooltip.recovery:
If you forget an ATC call (e.g. 'runway vacated' after landing),
the system resets automatically after this time.

Beginners: 50-60 sec. (more time to think)
Experienced: 15-20 sec. (keeps the flow tight)
tooltip.show_hints: Shows suggested pilot phrases for the current ATC situation.
tooltip.debug_text_input:
Replaces PTT/microphone with a text input field below the transcript.
Helps on a laptop without a headset and to debug the ATC logic without STT errors.
PTT stays active in parallel.

Shortcut: type 'REG' as a placeholder for your phonetic call sign.
Example: 'Bern Tower REG, request taxi runway 14'.
tooltip.enable_traffic:
Master switch for traffic advisories, landing sequencing and the
go-around trigger on an occupied runway.

Requires a traffic provider (LiveTraffic, xPilot, swift, X-IvAp
or native X-Plane AI) - without a provider the TCAS DataRefs stay empty
and the subsystem is silent anyway.

Turn off if you fly without traffic and want no overhead.
tooltip.bzf_strict_mode:
When active the Tower checks every pilot readback against the
NfL Sprechfunk 2024 paragraph 25 b) mandatory list (runway number,
QNH, frequency, squawk code, call sign).

Missing mandatory items lead to a corrective Tower response
instead of silent acceptance.

Default off: simulation mode stays tolerant.
Only visible in the DE profile.

Note: with local or Mistral speech recognition the spelled
call sign may be poorly recognized - strict mode then rejects
some correct readbacks. OpenAI is more robust.

Not official exam preparation - see docs/bzf/bzf_coverage.md.
tooltip.disregard: Reset the ATC dialog -- you can contact ATC again at any time
hints.tune_tower_inbound: Tune the Tower frequency above for the approach
hints.tune_ground_or_tower: Tune a Ground or Tower frequency
enroute.data_missing: Airspace data missing - check XP12 custom data installation
traffic.empty: (no traffic - check that a traffic plugin is active and aircraft are nearby)
panel.radio_off_warning_format: COM%d radio has no power - ATC disabled. Turn on avionics/battery or enable 'Skip radio power check' in Settings.
